text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking around town, I spy
Symboli Rudolf and Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So that's why you invited me out? Of course I'm
happy to help, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I understand why you'd be surprised. To tell you
the truth...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Ordinarily, I would love to, but there's a
meeting I can't afford to miss after class. Could
we make arrangements for another time?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: O-oh, really... Sure! Let's shoot for another time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Preeeez! Wanna hang out this weekend?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, Teio. I have an inspection tour for
an upcoming event...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...And after a while, I realized that I'm not really
acting like a student.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
True, not many students attend meetings
regularly, much less go on inspection tours...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now it all makes sense. ♪ That's why you want to
"spend the day like a typical student."

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Time waits for no one, and I've been so
preoccupied with my duties. However, life is
fleeting, and my time as a student is even shorter.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There will come a time when I'll need to fall back
on my youthful experiences. Therefore... I want to
try things that only a student can.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I hear you're knowledgeable about the latest
trends, and so...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Say no more. But if you want to experience the
trendier aspects of student life, then we ought to
consult with a pro.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Check it out, Prez! ♪ Doesn't this "Straight from
the Hive Honeycomb Honeyade" look amazing?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I understand the appeal of honeycomb given its
rarity, but wouldn't placing it right on top of the
drink make it difficult to consume?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But it looks appealing, and that's what makes it Umastagrammy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Finding those fleeting moments to share with your
followers is what's hip these days. ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I see... Then I'll order one. One must live in the
moment, and what better way to do that than
take on new challenges?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I bet that outfit would look adorable on
you! The lace at the shoulders would highlight
your cuteness. ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm. "Cute," huh... That's not a word I often hear
in association with myself. ...It's certainly a new
angle.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I don't suppose this would also count as
Umastagrammable?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it totally would! Actually... it might even go
viral. ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So we hold them like this and take a picture?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's take the shot and then post it to our
respective accounts! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Aaand done. Now we add some hashtags and
post! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A hashtag is a brief summary of what the photo is
about, isn't it? Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: "#Diligentpupil" ...Does this look all right to you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's very "you," so I don't see why not...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for spending time with me today! Hit me
up again if you ever want to hang. ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Same to you. You shed light on an aspect of
student life veiled in mystery to me. I can't thank
you enough.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So, what's the verdict? Did I succeed in behaving
like a typical student?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I'd say your worries are also part of the
student experience!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: As a student, you spend your time having fun with friends, studying, and worrying about your future—all while moving forward. What you're doing is the quintessential student experience.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah... You're right. This worry of mine is a precious
experience afforded to me by virtue of being a
student.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. ♪ Besides, "behaving like a student" will
be the last thing on your mind once you graduate,
right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I suppose the answer was right under my
nose the entire time. Thanks, Maruzensky. I'm
glad I came to you both for advice.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No worries. ♪ I got to see you doing it for the
'gram, and that's more than enough reward for
me. ♪
